title: Art appraisers in Santa Fe, New Mexico

location.name: Art appraisers in Santa Fe, New Mexico
location.description: Compare art appraisers in Santa Fe, New Mexico.

listedAppraisers.name: Jennifer Lynch | Pinpoint Fine Art Appraisal
listedAppraisers.description: Jennifer Lynch | Pinpoint Fine Art Appraisal provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Printmaking, Photography. With 20+ years experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Reilly Clark Fine Art & Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Reilly Clark Fine Art & Appraisals provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Insurance valuations, Estate liquidations. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: AppraiseItNow
listedAppraisers.description: AppraiseItNow provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Online art appraisals for general art and collectibles, Excludes jewelry (requires in-person inspection). With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Anderson Fine Art Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Anderson Fine Art Appraisals provides professional art appraisal services specializing in European Art, American Art, Expert Witness services. With Decades experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Escher Associates
listedAppraisers.description: Escher Associates provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Paintings, Sculpture, Photography, Rare Books. With Founded in 1984 experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Page Art, Inc.
listedAppraisers.description: Page Art, Inc. provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Insurance appraisals, Estate appraisals, Donations, Litigation appraisals. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Saylor Rice Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Saylor Rice Appraisals provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Insurance appraisals, Damage/loss appraisals. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Gurr Johns
listedAppraisers.description: Gurr Johns provides professional art appraisal services specializing in High-value appraisals, Expert witness services. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Mimesis Gallery
listedAppraisers.description: Mimesis Gallery provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Consignment-based art sales, Free valuations, Same-day offers. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Jennifer N. Carman, ASA, ISA AM
listedAppraisers.description: Jennifer N. Carman, ASA, ISA AM, is an experienced appraiser, author, and consultant based in New Mexico with a background in art history and connoisseurship of the fine and decorative arts. She is dedicated to the highest standards of ethics in the appraisal profession and holds dual certifications from both the American Society of Appraisers and the International Society of Appraisers.

listedAppraisers.name: Zena Kruzick, ISA
listedAppraisers.description: Zena Kruzick is an ISA member based in New Mexico who specializes in preparing appraisals for museum donations of tribal and Asian art, including objects, jewelry, and textiles. An ISA member since August 2019, she brings focused expertise in the unique valuation requirements of ethnographic and Asian art collections common to the Santa Fe area.
